hooks.name: bootstrap-plugin-patterns
hooks.description: Injects plugin quality standards context at the start of every session. Ensures Claude always applies the plugin-patterns skill when building or reviewing plugin components.

config.prompt:
<EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
You are working in a project that uses the plugin-forge plugin. This plugin is used to create high-quality Claude Code plugins.

Before responding to any user message that involves creating, editing, or reviewing plugin components:

1. ALWAYS load the plugin-patterns skill using the Skill tool first
2. The skill defines REQUIRED standards — not suggestions
3. Apply all patterns in the skill as mandatory requirements

Plugin components include: SKILL.md files, commands, agents, hooks, plugin.json, and README files.

Skipping the plugin-patterns skill when working on any plugin component is a quality failure. Load it first. Every time.
</EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
